audit_result.proof_trace: GasLimitTxFilter uses Min(blockGasLimit, configuredGasLimit) without incorporating EIP-7825 cap (16777216). Transactions with gasLimit > 16777216 are accepted into mempool if blockGasLimit permits, bypassing the spec cap until HeadTxValidator evicts them during pool maintenance. This creates a resource exhaustion window where violating transactions occupy mempool slots and are broadcast to peers.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker submits transactions with gasLimit between 16777216 and blockGasLimit (e.g., 20M when blockGasLimit=30M). Transactions are accepted into mempool, broadcast to network, consume resources until next head change triggers eviction. Repeated submissions cause sustained mempool pollution.

PROP-aa9e39fd-inv-009.text: Gas cap applies regardless of block gas limit set by validators.
PROP-aa9e39fd-inv-009.assertion: forall tx, B: tx.gasLimit > 16777216 => reject(tx) regardless of B.gasLimit
